name: Londontown Terrace Crab Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a skillet. Add onion rings and celery. Cook until onions are soft and golden.
2. Arrange alternate layers of crabmeat, shredded cheese (sharp, cheddar, or Swiss), and the onion/celery mixture into the pastry shell.
3. In a bowl, beat together eggs, half and half, salt, pepper, and red pepper. Pour over the layered ingredients in the pastry shell.
4. Bake in a hot oven at 400 degrees Fahrenheit until firm, about 30-40 minutes. Check by inserting a knife into the center; it should come out clean when set.
5. Decorate with tomato wedges or cherry tomatoes if desired. Allow to cool slightly before cutting.
Tuna, salmon, shrimp, or flaked fish can be substituted for crabmeat.
